_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Delivering business impact involves championing the role of data science within the organisation; understanding and champion user research, and can design and manage processes to gather and establish user needs; identifying and create opportunities to develop and deliver data science products to support organisational objectives, while collaborating across the organisation to fulfil meaningful goals; taking responsibility for delivering scalable data science products into the organisation, and establishing maintenance support.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-A-001 (DQ, cosine: 0.565), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.555).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.628). Shared vocabulary: [business, data]. DDaT-only terms [across, champion, championing, collaborating, create, deliver] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, cross, delivery, effective, functional] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.851, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 69-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (96.6%). The model interprets "Delivering business impact involves championing the role of data science within" as logically implying aspects of "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Superset of' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.608 ≈ STS 0.628 (gap 0.020). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [business, data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.2%. Shared tokens: [business, data]. DDaT-only: [across, champion, championing, collaborating, create, deliver]. WIDAI-only: [ability, build, cross, delivery, effective, functional].
